channel.title: Docker on Sebian Van de Spiegle
channel.description: Recent content in Docker on Sebian Van de Spiegle

item.title: Backend Financial API
item.author: sebian.vandespiegle@student.odisee.be (Sebian Van de Spiegle)
item.description:
Skills Demonstrated: FastAPI, Python, Docker, PostgreSQL, REST API Design, Rate Limiting, JWT Authentication, Security Headers, SAST (Bandit/Trivy), Docker Compose.

Endpoints
#

Auth, stocks, portfolio, watchlist, market data.

item.title: Homelab — orion-o6
item.author: sebian.vandespiegle@student.odisee.be (Sebian Van de Spiegle)
item.description: Skills Demonstrated: Docker Compose & volumes, Reverse proxying & SSL termination (Nginx/Traefik), Linux System Administration (Debian 12, cron jobs, logs), Database management (PostgreSQL), Network segmentation (Docker bridge, Tailscale), System security & isolation.
